Setlist Changes
- The Weight moved from after What Would You Say
- Gravedigger moved from after Warehouse
- Warehouse moved from after You Are My Sanity
- I'll Back You Up added

First time Big Eyed Fish has been played by Dave and Tim since 3.31.03.
First time Can't Find My Way Home has been played since 12.10.09.
First time Cortez the Killer has been played by Dave and Tim since 2.17.19.
First time Jason Isbell has guested (he also played on a few of the same songs as Dave at a Willie Nelson event on 1.12.19).
First time Mavis Staples has guested since 9.5.21 and first time ever with Dave & Tim.
First time RAab has guested since 9.24.17 and first time ever with Dave & Tim.

This show was broadcast on SiriusXM Channel 30 (Dave Matthews Band Radio) on March 22, 2024.
